changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7 AND np.title = 'Reporting'

changeSet.comment: Move Reporting page from order 7 to order 8

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7 AND title = 'Reporting'
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 8 AND title = 'Reporting'

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE id = 207 AND display_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Update TB Reporting workflow page template to display_order 8

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Disposal and Archiving page for Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Dispose of completed samples or transfer to biorepository for long-term archiving. Track disposal reasons, methods, and maintain complete audit trail.

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE id = 208

changeSet.comment: Insert TB Disposal and Archiving workflow page template

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Dispose of completed samples or transfer to biorepository for long-term archiving. Track disposal reasons, methods, and maintain complete audit trail.
